validation_rule: nbar, sigma_n, or kappa_prime uncertainty must come from beam calibration independent of Fig. 4 contrast fitting
recompute Fig. 3 branch moments and Fig. 4 no-refit RMSE; compare to current vector extraction
record width must be measured or simulated independently of the visibility FWHM being predicted
P_wv(q) and visibility/contrast must be paired by controlled which-way settings
sigma_abs or equivalent recoil/load calibration must not be inferred from the same visibility reduction
raw phase values must come from numerical fringe fits or author tables rather than model-inferred unwrapping
